funding_opportunities.program_name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
funding_opportunities.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: DPIIT, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Government of India
benefits: up to INR 50 lakh convertible debt

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startups, incorporated less than 2 years ago, Indian promoters holding >51% shares, innovative scalable business idea

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: STPI Next Generation Incubation Scheme (NGIS)
funding_opportunities.organization: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI), MeitY
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India
benefits: seed funding up to INR 25 lakh

eligibility.summary: Innovative tech startups working on software product development including embedded electronics from Tier-II locations (12 cities)

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: BIRAC SEED Fund (Sustainable Entrepreneurship And Enterprise Development)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: BIRAC, Department of Biotechnology, Government of India
benefits: equity investment up to INR 30 lakh

eligibility.summary: Post-Proof-of-Concept biotech startups; implemented through 16 BioNEST partner incubators across India

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: DST NIDHI Entrepreneur-in-Residence (EIR) Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India
funding_opportunities.program_owner: DST, Government of India (via 37+ partner incubators)

eligibility.summary: Graduate students and aspiring entrepreneurs; applications through 37+ partner TBIs/incubators across India

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: DST NIDHI PRAYAS (Promoting and Accelerating Young and Aspiring technology entrepreneurs)
funding_opportunities.organization: Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India
funding_opportunities.program_owner: DST, Government of India (via PRAYAS Centres at TBIs)

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens aged 18+, individual innovators or startup founders with science & technology-based ideas; applications via PRAYAS Centres at approved TBIs

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Kerala Startup Mission Incubation and Acceleration Program
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Government of Kerala, Department of Electronics and Information Technology

eligibility.summary: Startups at various stages from ideation to revenue stage; pre-incubation for idea-stage, incubation for MVP-stage, acceleration for revenue-stage

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: T-Hub Lab32 Market Readiness Program
funding_opportunities.program_owner: T-Hub Foundation, Hyderabad

eligibility.summary: MVP-ready and market-ready startups with initial traction and working product; Cohort 13 and 14 accepting applications on rolling basis

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Kotak BizLabs Accelerator Programme Season 2 (CSR Initiative)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Kotak Mahindra Bank (CSR initiative with IIMA Ventures, NSRCEL, T-Hub, FITT IIT Delhi)
benefits: grant support up to INR 30 lakh

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-registered startups, revenue-generating, post-MVP, market-ready with existing customer base in eligible sectors

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Cummins CSR Grant for Climate and Sustainability Tech
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Cummins India Foundation CSR program, administered by Venture Center

eligibility.summary: Early-stage technology entrepreneurs and startups working on environmental sustainability and climate change solutions with solutions ready for field testing/pilots

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Google Play Accelerator India Cohort 3
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Google Play

eligibility.summary: India-based startups, Seed to Series A stage, published app on Google Play Store, using AI/ML in core capacity, targeting Indian or global users

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: SAMRIDH Impact Accelerator Program 2026
funding_opportunities.program_owner: SAMRIDH Impact Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (SISPL)
benefits: grant, debt, or equity up to INR 1 crore

eligibility.summary: Early-to-mid-stage Indian startups in healthcare or climate-tech, TRL 4 and above, with early evidence of real-world impact

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Avishkar Venture Studio by CIE IIIT Hyderabad
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Centre for Innovation and Entrepreneurship, IIIT Hyderabad
benefits: seed funding up to INR 10 lakh

eligibility.summary: India-registered deeptech startups with at least one full-time founder, ideally with MVP and customer validation

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT Mandi Catalyst Investment Readiness Program
funding_opportunities.program_owner: IIT Mandi Catalyst (Technology Business Incubator)

eligibility.summary: Startups and innovators at various stages; multiple schemes available including NIDHI EIR, NIDHI PRAYAS, MeitY GENESIS, Startup India Seed Fund

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Boeing University Innovation Leadership Development (BUILD) 2026
funding_opportunities.organization: Boeing India with FITT IIT Delhi and IITM Incubation Cell
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Boeing India in partnership with FITT IIT Delhi and IITM Incubation Cell

eligibility.summary: Students graduating in 2026 or early-stage startups at pre-seed/idea stage in aerospace, spacetech, EV, e-mobility, green energy, sustainability

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: SINE IIT Bombay Project Titanium
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Society for Innovation and Entrepreneurship, IIT Bombay

eligibility.summary: IP originating from IIT Bombay; faculty-led research teams; sector-agnostic deep-tech pre-incubation

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: NIT Trichy CEDI Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Center for Entrepreneurship Development and Incubation (CEDI), NIT Trichy
funding_opportunities.program_owner: NIT Trichy (National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli)
benefits: seed fund up to INR 25 lakh

eligibility.summary: Technology-oriented startups in IT/electronics domain; focus on ICT and electronics sector

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: TattvaX Cohort 2 by i-Hub Gujarat and SanchiConnect
funding_opportunities.program_owner: i-Hub Gujarat (Government of Gujarat) and SanchiConnect

eligibility.summary: DeepTech startups in space, defence, drones, AI, and strategic technologies; preference for Gujarat-based but open to all India

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: LoopX Accelerator Cohort 1 by ISB DLabs and Tavasya Capital
funding_opportunities.program_owner: ISB DLabs (Indian School of Business) and Tavasya Capital

eligibility.summary: Pre-seed to Series A circular economy startups with strong technical thesis, India-first but scalable globally

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: Alphamark Atom Accelerator for Consumer Brands and Commerce-Tech
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Alphamark Ventures

eligibility.summary: Running consumer business with min INR 5-15 lakh monthly revenue, or ecommerce-tech startups delivering solutions; cohort starts April 2026

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: NASSCOM 10,000 Startups Program
funding_opportunities.program_owner: National Association of Software and Services Companies (NASSCOM)

eligibility.summary: IT and IT-enabled technology startups at any stage from idea to revenue; pan-India open

funding_opportunities.label: startup

funding_opportunities.program_name: ACE $100k Accelerator Cohort 2026 by Invention Engine
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Invention Engine

eligibility.summary: Early-stage AI and deeptech startups with MVP/product, 6-12 months in operation, some users preferred; must be able to relocate to Delhi NCR
